servers.name: central-mcp
servers.description: Platform-wide service hub. Resend (email), VinSolutions, Vapi, Tavus, Coolify.
servers.notes: Set CENTRAL_MCP_TOKEN env in this profile's .env after the operator provisions a per-profile token in central-mcp config. Then flip enabled to true.
